title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Supertech - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Supertech - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Supertech has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supertech:
Supertech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supertech!
